summary: Completed targeted backend + frontend verification for P0 multi-image upload and slider/carousel behaviors on public URL, including save/load persistence and post-test restoration.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for requested P0 image upload + slider scope.
Optional: add valid non-empty image fixtures in browser automation for stronger visual assertions beyond selector/count checks.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth credential registry file /app/memory/test_credentials.md is present but does not contain explicit test account entries; current run used credentials from review request.
useSiteContent is instantiated in multiple pages/layouts, which can cause repeated /api/site-content fetches and avoidable network overhead.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data created. Admin product catalog was snapshotted and restored after UI/API mutation test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated end-to-end flow: admin uploader can append images after initial image (1/5 -> 2/5 -> 4/5), save persists images via /api/admin/products and /api/products/digital-forward-2, shop card slider renders per-image slides+dots, and product detail carousel thumbnails/arrows/counter update correctly. Catalog restore confirmed.
rca of the issue: No functional defect reproduced in requested scope. The earlier observed upload script failure ('bytes-like object required') was test-script input encoding, not product code; resolved by passing byte buffers for file upload simulation.
